scenes.purpose: Ella attempts to debug a system anomaly in the data center.
scenes.objective: Ella wants to find the source of the feedback loop causing the system issue.
scenes.turning_point: An urgent alert flashes, prompting Ella to investigate further.
beats: Ella debugs code and monitors flashing screens.
Ella examines complex code and system logs.

scenes.purpose: Marcus arrives and questions Ella's abilities.
scenes.objective: Marcus wants to belittle Ella's efforts and assert his dominance.
scenes.turning_point: Ella remains focused on the problem despite Marcus's skepticism.

scenes.purpose: Ella discovers a pattern in the system logs that suggests a solution.
scenes.objective: Ella wants to find a clue about the feedback loop's origin.
scenes.turning_point: Ella shares her observation with Marcus, leading to collaboration.
beats: Ella analyzes system logs and finds a pattern.
She presents her findings to Marcus.

scenes.purpose: Ella and Marcus work together to solve the anomaly.
scenes.objective: They want to improve data flow and optimize code segments.
scenes.turning_point: Marcus's confidence is slowly eroded by Ella's competence.
beats: Ella and Marcus analyze data streams.
They discuss their individual backgrounds and experiences.

scenes.purpose: Ella identifies the root cause of the anomaly and works with Marcus to fix it.
scenes.objective: They want to resolve the feedback loop and restore system functionality.
scenes.turning_point: Ella finds the faulty conditional statement, leading to a successful resolution.
beats: Ella discovers the flawed code segment.
They refactor and optimize the code together.
The feedback loop is successfully eliminated.
